title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers outlines five production deployment patterns for TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, multi-layer authentication with OAuth and IAM isolation, type-safe database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability via metrics and distributed tracing. The patterns are implementation-agnostic but demonstrated on AWS infrastructure.
